docket_entries.description: APPLICATION PENDING FOR WAIVER OF JURY FEES AND EXPENSES PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY DEFENDANT DE SOUSA, BEATRIZ LACERDA (SUED AS LACEREDA) HEARING SET FOR JUN-27-2012 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206

MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON JUN-27-2012 IN 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT BEATRIZ DE SOUSA'S WAIVER OF ADDITIONAL COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT DENIED THE APPLICATION AS TO JURY FEES AND COSTS. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: E. BURA; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
